hooks.command: git pull --ff-only origin main 2>/dev/null || echo 'WARN: git pull failed — you may have local changes or no remote configured'
cd /Users/Toby_1/Vendo-OS && git pull --ff-only origin main 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; cd /Users/Toby_1/Vendo-OS && if git diff --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null && git diff --cached --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; DIR=$(echo "$f" | sed 's|.*/Vendo-OS/||' | sed 's|/[^/]*$||'); FILE=$(basename "$f"); git add "$f" && git commit -m "auto: update $DIR/$FILE" && git push origin main; } 2>/dev/null || true
